title: Melorra Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Melorra Capital India is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Melorra Capital India! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Bengaluru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Melorra Capital India:
Melorra Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra Capital India!
